source_mode: EN-asset-is-English (asset text fields are English with internal fullwidth U+FF0C; en.json holds English; ja.json is JP-primary identity map)
title_vi: Chắc Chắn Sẽ Trở Về Tổng Hành Din Rồi♪
speaker_label_policy: JP charaload/speaker labels preserved verbatim (field 1): 一般兵Ａ/Ｂ, モンスター, エメルダ, ルディア, 先輩記者, <user>. In-dialogue name mentions romanized to Scoop / Emeralda per shipped VI convention.
h18: No H-18 / adult content in this scene. All characters confirmed 18+ per project rule; not applicable here.
intentional_localizations: Monster SFX 'Giii!' -> 'Giíi!', 'Gwooo!' -> 'Gùuoo!' (Vietnamese roars; not proper names, must change to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT_RECORDS).

Internal
break count per text field set to match EN asset authority (75 records).
ASCII comma inside Vietnamese text replaced with U+201A '‚' (fullwidth U+FF0C in EN kept as-is in structure, VI uses ‚).
Title and messageTextCenter cards in Vietnamese Title Case with <size=48>…</size> preserved (<size=48>—Vài Giờ Sau.</size>, <size=48>—Giờ Ăn Tối</size>).
notes: EN-asset-is-English case; translated from EN text fields (ja.json identity map, en.json English values). All 75 records changed. No missing source. No CAKE/uncertain items.
